zh.lifeSummary: 當Rafe I de Bellers of Kettleby於1167年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，他的父親Sampson de Bellers of Kettleby25歲，母親Mrs. Sampson de Bellers22歲。他和Emma de Foleville至少有6個兒子。他去世於1216年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bellers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bellairs
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bellars , suggesting French belle(s) aire(s) ‘lovely demeanor’.

variants.name: Bellars
meanings: (of Norman origin): apparently from Old French bélier ‘ram’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a ram in some way or possibly a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd. In Northamptonshire the name attracts excrescent -s already by 1377.

nameMeanings.name: Rafe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spelling representation of the traditional pronunciation of the name   Ralph  , a pronunciation now largely restricted to the upper classes in England.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Rafe I de Bellers of Kettleby was born in 1167, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sampson de Bellers of Kettleby, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Sampson de Bellers, was 22. He had at least 6 sons with Emma de Foleville. He died in 1216, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rafe I de Bellers of Kettleby est né en 1167, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sampson de Bellers of Kettleby, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Sampson de Bellers, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Emma de Foleville. Il est décédé en 1216, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Rafe I de Bellers of Kettlebyが1167年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで生まれた時，父Sampson de Bellers of Kettlebyは25歳，母Mrs. Sampson de Bellersは22歳であった。彼はEmma de Folevilleとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1216年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rafe I de Bellers of Kettleby(이)가 1167년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sampson de Bellers of Kettleby(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Sampson de Bellers(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Emma de Foleville(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rafe I de Bellers of Kettleby родился в 1167 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sampson de Bellers of Kettleby было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Sampson de Bellers, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Emma de Foleville. Он умер в 1216 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.
